title: MXene-Assisted NiFe sulfides for high-performance anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: Herein, we report a robust OER electrocatalyst for AEMSE by integrating MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>) with NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)

跨学科关系.head: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub> and Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>
跨学科关系.evidence: The strong interaction between (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub> and Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> induces electron distribution to trigger lattice oxygen mechanism

跨学科关系.head: Ti-O-Fe bonding
跨学科关系.tail: dissolution of Fe species during OER process
跨学科关系.evidence: particularly prohibits the dissolution of Fe species during OER process via the Ti-O-Fe bonding effectively

跨学科关系.head: good retention of sulfates and the abundant groups of Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>
跨学科关系.evidence: the good retention of sulfates and the abundant groups of Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> provide effective Cl<sup>-</sup> resistance

跨学科关系.head: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>
跨学科关系.evidence: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> achieves high OER activity (1.598 V@2 A cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>
跨学科关系.evidence: and long-term durability (1000 h) in seawater system

title: Leaf-based energy harvesting and storage utilizing hygroscopic iron hydrogel for continuous power generation

跨学科关系.head: hygroscopic iron hydrogels
跨学科关系.evidence: a water gradient is established between areas with/without hydrogel coating

跨学科关系.head: water gradient
跨学科关系.evidence: forming electrical double layers over the leaf surface

跨学科关系.head: electrical double layers
跨学科关系.evidence: showing capacitance-like behavior for energy charging and discharging

跨学科关系.head: leaf cell structures
跨学科关系.evidence: enabled uniform carbon coatings instead of aggregations

跨学科关系.head: carbon coatings
跨学科关系.evidence: high electrical conductivity

跨学科关系.head: electrical conductivity
跨学科关系.evidence: resulting in 49 μA/cm 2 and 497 μW/cm 3 electrical output

跨学科关系.head: electrical conductivity
跨学科关系.evidence: resulting in 49 μA/cm 2 and 497 μW/cm 3 electrical output

title: Precisely designing asymmetrical selenium-based dual-atom sites for efficient oxygen reduction

跨学科关系.head: dual-atom catalysts (DACs)
跨学科关系.evidence: dual-atom catalysts (DACs) with well-defined active sites are attracting increasing attention

跨学科关系.head: heteronuclear SeN<sub>2</sub>-MN<sub>2</sub>
跨学科关系.evidence: asymmetric selenium-based dual-atom catalysts that comprise heteronuclear SeN<sub>2</sub>-MN<sub>2</sub> (M = Fe, Mn, Co, Ni, Cu, Mo, etc.) active sites for the efficient oxygen reduction reaction (ORR)

跨学科关系.head: SeFe dual-atom sites
跨学科关系.evidence: compared with the Se or Fe single-atom sites, the SeFe dual-atom sites facilitate a reduction in the conversion energy barrier from *O to *OH via the coadsorption of *O intermediates

跨学科关系.head: selenium-iron dual-atom catalysts
跨学科关系.evidence: selenium-iron dual-atom catalysts achieves superior alkaline ORR performance, with a half-wave potential of 0.926 V vs. a reversible hydrogen electrode

跨学科关系.head: SeN<sub>2</sub>-FeN<sub>2</sub>-based Zn-air battery
跨学科关系.evidence: the SeN<sub>2</sub>-FeN<sub>2</sub>-based Zn-air battery has a high specific capacity (764.8 mAh g<sup>-1</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: SeN<sub>2</sub>-FeN<sub>2</sub>-based Zn-air battery
跨学科关系.evidence: a maximum power density (287.2 mW cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: heteronuclear DACs
跨学科关系.evidence: This work may provide a good perspective for designing heteronuclear DACs to improve ORR efficiency
